lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: Got anything you want me to crush?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'd like you to crush something.

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: Hand it to me, and I'll get to work. I charge 50 coins per item.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of things do you crush?

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: All kinds of things! Unicorn horns, goat horns, blue dragon scales and much more besides. Hand me your stuff, and I'll try to crush it. I charge 50 coins per item.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: I'm Wesley. I used to work on a big ship, exploring the world with my mother, but then I didn't get on very well at the fleet's training school, so I quit all that.

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: So I moved to Nardah and took up this job crushing stuff instead. It's always been a passion of mine, crushing things. I'm a lot happier now.

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: The world is so much simpler when you're crushing. You know you just have to grind for long enough until you get the job done. It might take hours, but you just grind until you're done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not interested, thanks.

sections.title: Using something on him that he does not crush

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: No, that's not the sort of thing I like crushing.

sections.title: Using something on him without enough coins

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: Sorry, I charge 50 coins per item.

sections.title: Using something on him that he can crush with enough coins

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: I'm not very good at Herblore, so you'll only get 3 shards from lava scales that I crush. You might get more if you do it yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 3 shards per scale is fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Forget it - I'll do it myself.

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: Grind it!

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: Crush it!

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: The grind is real!

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: Griiiiiiind!

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: Gotta crush 'em all!

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: Crush crush crush!

lines.speaker: Wesley
lines.text: Round and round and round we go!
